headline: Goldman Says It’s Ready to Pounce as Retail Flees Private Credit

headline: Why Western Digital (WDC) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of leading data storage manufacturer Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC) jumped 4.5% in the morning session after Morgan Stanley raised its price target on the stock, citing robust demand for hard disk drives (HDDs).

headline: How The Prudential (LSE:PRU) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Capital Returns
summary: Prudential’s fair value estimate has shifted only slightly, with the model price target moving from £13.71 to £13.73 per share, keeping the headline valuation change fairly muted. That small move sits against a backdrop of analysts setting targets across a wide band, from around £12.70 to £15.00 and adjusting individual views by as much as £50 or more. This highlights how differently the same set of fundamentals is being interpreted. Reading on, you will see what is driving these moves and...

headline: Stocks Rise, Oil Falls as Traders Gauge Truce Odds: Markets Wrap
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Signs of last-ditch efforts to secure a truce in the war that has rattled global markets spurred a cautious advance in stocks as oil retreated.Equities rose for a fourth straight session, with the S&P 500 set for its longest winning streak since January amid hopes for a push toward a ceasefire in the Middle East. Micron Technology Inc. led gains in chipmakers. US crude dropped to around $111. The dollar fell. Bonds wavered.US allies are reportedly pressing for a deal with Iran as

headline: How The Accor (ENXTPA:AC) Investment Story Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Valuation Calls
summary: Analysts recently adjusted their fair value estimate for Accor from €56.68 to €55.71, a reduction of about €0.96 per share. This tweak sits within a broader mix of target cuts and target raises and reflects different views on how confidently Accor can deliver on its growth and margin plans. As you read on, you will see what is driving those opinions and how to keep track of the evolving story around the stock. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story.
